introSection: Crazy Dane Coaster is an E&F Miler Industries wild mouse roller coaster located at Scandia Family Fun Center in Sacramento, California, USA. This coaster is a reference to the Great Dane.

sections.title: History
sections.content: Crazy Dane Coaster was originally called Wild Mouse when it opened at Casino Pier on May 28, 1999. In October 2012, Hurricane Sandy caused lots of damage to the park, destroying the Star Jet, Log Flume and other rides. Wild Mouse was largely intact and was moved to Scandia Family Fun Center as Crazy Dane Coaster and reopened on March 30, 2015.

fullText:
Crazy Dane Coaster is an E&F Miler Industries wild mouse roller coaster located at Scandia Family Fun Center in Sacramento, California, USA. This coaster is a reference to the Great Dane.

Crazy Dane Coaster was originally called Wild Mouse when it opened at Casino Pier on May 28, 1999. In October 2012, Hurricane Sandy caused lots of damage to the park, destroying the Star Jet, Log Flume and other rides. Wild Mouse was largely intact and was moved to Scandia Family Fun Center as Crazy Dane Coaster and reopened on March 30, 2015.
